meaning: [计] 比较两个或多个文件
examples: Her children go to the local comp.
Workers' comp pays for work-related medical problems.
Comp time is often promised to firefighters and police officers.
If you were already in the top quartile of high-paid plutocrats, your comp nearly doubled.
Since 1978 it had barred the Internal Revenue Service from issuing regulations covering "nonqualified" deferred comp.
